    def check_packages(adb) -> None:
        """
        Verify all required packages are installed.
        Repair strategy:
          - com.fca.appmanagertestapp → adb install ../apk/AppManagerTestApp.apk  (priority)
          - other packages            → app_install(adb, <apk_filename>)
          - system packages           → hard fail if missing (cannot auto-install)
        """
        def _get_installed():
            output = adb.shell("pm list packages", check=False)
            return set(output.strip().splitlines())
    
        installed = _get_installed()
    
        missing = [
            pkg for pkg in REQUIRED_PACKAGES
            if f"package:{pkg}" not in installed
        ]
    
        if not missing:
            return
    
        # Hard fail for system packages
        no_repair = [p for p in missing if p in _NO_REPAIR_PACKAGES]
        assert not no_repair, (
            "Pre-test check FAILED: missing system packages (cannot auto-install):\n"
            + "\n".join(f"  - {p}" for p in no_repair)
        )
    
        # Install via app_install (test app must already be running, APK files must exist in files/)
        for pkg in missing:
            apk = _PACKAGE_TO_APK.get(pkg)
            assert apk, (
                f"Pre-test check FAILED: no APK mapping defined for package '{pkg}'"
            )
            app_install(adb, apk)
            time.sleep(6)
    
        # Verify all repairs succeeded
        installed = _get_installed()
        still_missing = [p for p in missing if f"package:{p}" not in installed]
>       assert not still_missing, (
               ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
            "Pre-test check FAILED: could not install packages:\n"
            + "\n".join(f"  - {p}" for p in still_missing)
